case_title: BYRON BARBOUR VS. UNIVERSAL PROTECTION SERVICES LP

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF REGARDING THE FILING OF A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FOR CLAIM AGAINST UNIVERSAL PROTECTION SERVICES LP FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARBOUR, BYRON

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARBOUR, BYRON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL PROTECTION SERVICES LP $4,672.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,672.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,672.00 FILED BY BARBOUR, BYRON AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL PROTECTION SERVICES LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-20-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-10-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL PROTECTION SERVICES LP
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARBOUR, BYRON AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL PROTECTION SERVICES LP
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $4,691.68 AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSAL PROTECTION SERVICES LP

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARBOUR, BYRON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.
